case_title: JOAO BETTENCOURT VS. VARELL LAPHALLE FULLER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BETTENCOURT, JOAO AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, VARELL LAPHALLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, VARELL LAPHALLE

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
